title: Repulsorfield Generator
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Repulsorfield Generator''' was a specialized prisoner restraint built by [[Cartel Secureworks]].

It was a manacle that was fitted to a prisoner's left ankle (or equivalent) which caused the convict to be unable to move more than a foot off the ground. This type of restraint was only used on prisoners with a predilection for climbing or flight to cut down on potential escapes.
